prerequisites.value: Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( dueling sword ), Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus ( dueling sword ).

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a +2 morale bonus on all Intimidate checks to demoralize opponents, and the DC of any attempt to demoralize you increases by 2. When you’re participating in a duel, these bonuses increase to +4. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: During any combat that is not a duel, you can spend 1 stamina point at the start of your turn to treat the combat as a duel until the start of your next turn for the purpose of gaining the benefits of the Dueling Discipline feat.
